status: RETROSPECTIVE PROTOTYPE — hand-curated shortlist, not an automated search of a large candidate space
how_shortlist_built: metabolites/nutraceuticals with (a) a documented muscle- or aging-relevant mechanism AND (b) at least one human oral study, drawn from muscle-aging and geroprotector literature; NOT an exhaustive metabolome enumeration

explicitly_rejected.reason: computed target-fit fails: polyamine-synthesis genes DHPS/SMS/SRM INCREASE with age in the panel (DHPS r=+0.195, FDR=3e-6) — against a 'restore' rationale
high evidence (rank 2, 7.5) but EXCLUDED from the primary cocktail by the distinctness filter — glycine + cysteine overlap the 1C cocktail; retained as a redox add-on arm

not_enumerated: A full metabolome-wide candidate universe (e.g. HMDB/Metabolomics-Workbench-derived) was NOT generated; this is the primary scope limit of the prototype.
